hatch_conditions: Spring and summer mayfly hatches, warmer water temperatures, clear to slightly stained water
notes: Versatile mayfly imitation for PMD and similar hatches. Works in various sizes depending on local insects.

hatch_conditions: Cooler months, overcast days, small mayfly hatches
notes: Standard BWO pattern that works across many regions and conditions.

hatch_conditions: General mayfly hatches, attractor pattern when specific insects unknown
notes: Classic attractor dry fly that works in most trout waters and conditions.
Essential caddis pattern that works in most trout streams with caddis populations.

hatch_conditions: Year-round subsurface feeding, fast water and deep runs
notes: Classic stonefly nymph imitation. One of the most versatile nymph patterns.

hatch_conditions: Winter and early spring, cold water, deep pools and tailwaters
notes: Essential small fly pattern for winter fishing and selective trout.

hatch_conditions: Year-round predatory feeding, various water conditions
notes: Versatile streamer that imitates baitfish, leeches, and other prey.

hatch_conditions: Winter and early spring, slow water and pools
notes: Simple worm pattern effective when trout feed on aquatic worms.

hatch_conditions: Year-round subsurface feeding, various flows and depths
notes: Classic and versatile nymph pattern that works in most trout waters.

hatch_conditions: Aggressive feeding periods, larger prey available
notes: Large streamer pattern for targeting bigger trout.

hatch_conditions: Midge activity, selective feeding on small insects
notes: Tiny pattern for when trout are focused on midges and small flies.
Heavy nymph that sinks quickly for deep presentations.
